explanations.2: The `-webkit-` prefix is for older browsers (Chrome, Safari) that don't yet understand the standard `line-clamp` property.
explanations.3: This limits the paragraph to show only 3 lines of text before cutting it off.
explanations.5: This tells the browser to lay out text vertically (top to bottom) instead of horizontally, which is required for line-clamping to work properly.
